comment: Unified EMerge simulation configuration. Supports any number of ports (1, 4, or more) - just adjust the 'ports' array below.

sweep._comment: Frequency sweep range in Hz and number of points

mesh._comment: Global mesh resolution and air sphere margin

air_sphere._comment: Optional: manual air sphere definition. Omit this block to auto-size from geometry.

ports.name: Port1
ports._comment: Single 1-port example. Change entire 'ports' array for 4-port or N-port.

metals.name: metal_structures
metals._comment: Metal volume: kind can be 'pec_volume' or 'conductor_volume' (with sigma)

preview._comment: Show geometry and mesh previews (will pause for user confirmation)

outputs._comment: Output folder path and base name for this run

farfield_export._comment: 3D farfield export per port: theta=[0..π], phi=[-π..π]

_INSTRUCTIONS.to_run_1port: Use the 'ports' array with 1 element (single port)
_INSTRUCTIONS.to_run_4port: Replace entire 'ports' array with 'ports_4port_example' array above
_INSTRUCTIONS.to_run_nport: Add N port objects to the 'ports' array with desired coordinates
_INSTRUCTIONS.materials: Define dielectrics and metals as volumetric imports; surfaces as BC-controlled imports
_INSTRUCTIONS.air_sphere: Omit to auto-size from geometry bounds, or specify manually with radius+center
_INSTRUCTIONS.touchstone_export: Automatically exports .s1p for 1-port, .s4p for 4-port, .sNp for N-port
